title: Vowor 4G Smartwatch for Kids with Sim Card, Waterproof Phone Watch with WiFi LBS GPS Tracker Video Chat SOS Camera Alarm Clock Anti Lost Watches Children Boys Girls Birthday Gift Age 3-15 (Black)
description:
Vowor Smart watches 4G for Kids
Kids smartwatch supports 4G/3G/2G Nano sim card with data and voice plans.
GSM Bands:
US: B2/B5
3G Bands (WCDMA):
US: B2/B5
4G Band(FDD TDD):
US:B2/4/5/7/12/17
Note:
1. you need to have voice and data plan to make the kids phone watch works properly 2. The Vowor 4G kids phone watch is NOT compatible with Verizon or Sprint, we recommend T-Mobile, Speedtalk and AT&T. But it is ok if your own's phone (parent's) card is Verizon or Sprint. The Vowor kids smartwatch doesn't support other APP except Leefine.
Q&A:
1. Why the watch doesn’t have the network(The watch shows "Search ... " for a long time)
(1) The SIM card is not overdue. (2) Check the upper left corner of the watch interface for stable signal icons or up and down arrows. If no, please restart the watch. (3) There may be no set the correct APN.
2. Why the watch cannot recognize the SIM card
(1) Confirm that the SIM card is not overdue. (2) Confirm that the SIM card is installed in the right direction. (3) Power off before card insertion. (4) Change the region and try again.
3. Why can't I make a video call
(1) Confirm that the SIM card has data and the network signal is stable. (2) Check whether the APP side is disabled for video calls. (3) Other family members who want video calls need to have a Leefine account and bind the watch. (4) Whether all permissions of APP needed are granted. (5) The APP needs to be opened, run and work in the background. Only the video call is initiated on the watch end, the APP end can receive the push message. (6) The video call has just ended. It will take 5 minutes for the watch end to call again.
Package Included:
1 x Kids smartwatch 1 x USB cable 1x User manual 1x Watch screen protector 1x sim card
features: 【Vowor 4G Kids Smart watch】: the smartwatch kids 4G has all functions you need: Face-talk (video calling), wifi LBS GPS Tracker, geofencing, Pedometer, Voice chat, Texts, Anti-lost, Class Mode, HD Camera, Historical tracker, Safe zones, Remote monitoring, SOS, alarm clock, low battery notification etc. It is a great gift for your kid 3-15 years old.

【Two-way Calling】: the Vowor 4G kids phone watch supports video calling and voice calling, you can chat with your kids face to face, but also can make a voice call. Make sure your sim card have the plan with Voice & Data: voice plan is for calling, and data plan is for network.

【4G WIFI LBS GPS Tracker】: Double position technology based on AGPS, Location Base on Cell Tower Station means double safety for kids. GPS is suitable for outdoor(especially in open areas),with a little inaccurate; WIFI is suitable for indoor, the accuracy depends on the carrier's backend database; LBS depends on the density of the communication base station and where you are, the inaccurate is relatively large. The watch choose GPS first, then WIFI, and finally the LBS. At the same time, parent

【Safety Protection】: 4G smartwatch for Kids equipped with an LBS/GPS/WIFI system that accurate location, you can check the real-time location of your kids and history activity footprint. You can also set the child's range of activity, if the child leaves the set area, the geofencing feature will alerts you. Accurate activity tracker, built-in speed sensor.

【1-year Warranty】: The kids smartwatch is made of high quality material, anti-fall and durable. The band strap is made of soft Silicone, it is very comfortable to wear it and it does not scratch the hand. We will provide 1-year warranty, replacements such as band strap or data cords will be send out for free. If you have any problems about our smart watches, Please feel free to contact us first. We will reply you within 24 hours.

They attached easily. So far, so good.  Having said that, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

reviews.title: A+

reviews.title: Really neat little smartwatch.
reviews.text: If you’re looking for a smartwatch that won’t break the bank but still provide handy applications at your literal fingertips, then this is a great buy! Works with iPhone or Android and it’s super easy to set up. The battery life so far is pretty good but I also haven’t had it for too long so will update if anything goes haywire. So far it’s exactly as described by the seller and it arrived quickly and packaged nicely. Great for self-use or a gift.

reviews.title: Not a Good Choice for Me
reviews.text:
Like - was able to call and receive texts. Was able to answer a call on the watch. Pairing was easy. The app was easy.
Dislike - Once paired, the watch takes all your media volume away from your phone. You won't hear any music like from YouTube, text message alert or phone ringing. The watch has a little vibration that you can barely feel, when you receive a text or getting a phone call. All sounds like from Facebook videos or anything, goes through the watch. The only way I could find to get it to quit doing this, was to unpair the watch totally. I need military time but couldn't find a way to make the time in a 24 hour format. You have to put the watch together. The bands come apart from the watch. Everytime you move your hand the watch face lights up. This was definitely not what I was looking for at all. Would I buy this again? No.

reviews.title: Poor Measurements - Support Cannot Help
reviews.text:
After charging for 30 minutes as instructed, I paired the smart watch with the app. This was easy, and the one reason I gave it 2 stars instead of 1. The other reason for 2 stars, the interface was easier to use than I expected.

But if the measurements are not accurate, ease of use doesn't matter.

I bought this smart watch to track my heart rate while exercising—mainly walking. After recent heart procedures, my doctor wants me to keep my pulse below a certain rate. Each time I measure, the pulse differs substantially from the pulse oximeter that always agrees with my doctor's office pulse oximeter, and heart monitor. It goes as high as 90 when the PO says 52. I took multiple measurements, including taking my own pulse. The closest measurements were 60 when the actual rate was 51 or 52.

Support is through a chat on the app. I did not wait long for support, however they did not try to help me. They insisted that the heart rate changes. That I had to let it sync with the app. Not once did they address the possibility that the smart watch might be reading the rate wrong. Told me to try again after I had already tried multiple times.

Focusing on anything but the issue I am reporting does not help me. Even suggesting I exercise and measure my heart rate. Telling me the human heart rate is constantly changing. Literally, answers like they were talking to a small child.

I had high hopes for this device. It disappointed on two levels - Heart Rate, Support. I cannot recommend. Look for a different smart watch if you need accurate heart rate measurements.

reviews.title: NOT AS DESCRIBED AT ALL
reviews.text: I carefully read all reviews before purchasing this smart watch but was so disappointed. It would not hold preferences & kept defaulting to kg & cm. Would not toggle from one thing to another on app. Had to go all the way out of app & go back in before it would toggle from steps to profile to anything else. Sometimes I'd get my cell to ring on my watch, never could answer it or text back from the watch. I'd rather pay the extra & get an apple watch that actually works. I can't tell you how many times I set the preferences & saved them only to find it defaulted right back the next day.  One of the sorriest watches I've ever owned & I kept it 2 weeks before returning it really trying to make it work.

reviews.title: Better than name brand. Long battery life!!
reviews.text: I will take this watch over a fit bit any day! In fact my husband bought me a fit bit and I returned it because thus watch is soooo much better. What I like most is the BATTERY LIFE IS AMAZING! I bought it weeks ago and have only charged it twice.

reviews.title: Never dies
reviews.text: This thing is great.  Does everything you would expect and the battery lasts FOREVER!!  Great smartwatch.

reviews.title: Sleep function is worthless
reviews.text: I really like this watch, has everything I wanted and everything works with one exception:  the sleep analysis feature is worthless.  It only records sleep between 10:00 pm and 8:00 am and if you move or get up it screws up everything. Good customer service, they really try to help, but they will tell you if you get up to go to the bathroom, watch begins recording all over again. Too bad!

reviews.title: Seems to work pretty well for the most part
reviews.text: Setup was easy with a quick app download and it paired with my iPhone 12 without any drama. Biometric tracking seems to work reasonably well with the exception of heart rate, which seems to always read 70 no matter what I'm doing. I'm not too crazy about the aesthetic of the watch, it just looks kind of cheap to me. I got this mainly to use as a health tracking tool and to tell time, not to make and receive calls/texts with, so I haven't setup any of those features yet and may never get around to doing so. So i can't comment on ease of use for any of those features. I did like that there are quite a lot of different watch face designs that can be applied and without any additional purchase. For the price of around $40, this is a pretty smokin' deal for a smart watch, I think.

reviews.title: Not bad for the price
reviews.text:
I’ve tried a few different affordable watches and my biggest issue has been the charging port. They have trouble staying connected with tiny pins and no magnetic pull. So going into this I’m more critical.
Upside is there is definitely a better charging system. It holds in place nicely even though it’s a pretty small pin area it is easier to charge.
The screen does have low sensitivity response. When pairing it it took 3 tries to get it recognize I had tapped the screen.
On a good note it’s reading well and has some great features like heart rate, oxygen, and sleep. Everything lined up well with my normal statistics so I feel it’s pretty accurate.
There’s a variety of images to choose from so you can customize the screen however you would like.
It’s very comfortable. The band holds like a premium watch band. It has a large face that is classy. Aesthetically it’s very nice.
Overall for an affordable smart watch it’s a decent option.

reviews.title: Okay tracker
reviews.text: For the price, it is an okay tracker.  The microphone on the watch is not of great quality as I was told sounded muffled on it.  It does have a lot of features and was quite easy to use but nothing about it made it stand out from the other hundreds of smart watches out on the market.

reviews.title: Cute watch is all I can say
reviews.text: Initially the watch was quick to charge and holds the charge for a couple of days.  The functions were easy to use, and a lot to choose from for the activities I do.  I mainly track my steps, distance, duration, heart rate.  It worked well for a few weeks, then I took it swimming for a few laps in the pool.  That was a mistake, battery stopped working (won't charge anymore).  Sad, I really liked the watch, it's cute but the battery died.

reviews.title: Great Smart watch for the essentials
reviews.text:
I was looking for a good smart watch for my mother. She was a Fitbit user but her Fitbit died after years of use and wanted something with a similar feel.
This watch really worked out for her.
It's got a great screen and a good amount of apps to provide essential uses.
It's able to work with iOS and Android.
It's able to get notifications from apps and make phone calls.
Not a bad product at all.

reviews.title: Great watch, much better than my old "smart" watch
reviews.text:
I got Moto 360 several years ago when smart watches first came out and it was nice, but annoying. It was tied into everything and kept giving me alerts and so eventually I got tired of it. My wife also had a first generation Samsung Gear watch and that was about the same as the Moto.
Well, fast forward a few years and now my wife, daughter, son and daughter-in-law all have newer smart watches (Apple Watches and Fitbit) and they all love them. It was time to get a new phone, so I got a Samsung S20 FE and then decided to get the Samsung watch. I saw on the reviews that it really works well with Samsung phones and so I decided to get the Watch 3. I was looking at the Watch 2, which had a few less features and then I found the Watch 3 in the 41mm size and then found a refurbished one so I ended up paying about the same for the Watch 3 as I would have for the Watch 2.
I'm very impressed with the watch and really love it. I didn't get the one with a cell phone, it just connects to my phone with bluetooth and/or wifi, but it's really amazing. I get my messages, and can turn off the ones that I don't want and then I also get all the health apps. So, now it tells me to get off my chair and walk around and does EKG and stress tesing and Oxygen levels..
I was concerned that the 41 mm might be too small, but it is a great size for me as you can see from the pic. I have had a Citizen Echo Drive for more than 10 years and it is a little larger, but I like the size of the Watch 3 better.
If you are thinking about getting a watch, this one is a good deal right now and I believe it does work best if you use it with a Samsung phone.

reviews.title: Love the watch, hate the battery.
reviews.text: I don't use the sleep tracking because the watch is bulky and annoying while trying to sleep. The mobile app is ok, constantly running in background.  The battery life sucks, only good for a day and sometimes a day and a half which is to bad because I do love all the things it does. I think I can answer my phone on my watch (still figuring out how) can definitely hang up on unwanted calls and can read messages.  Good pedometer and workout tool. Overall nice watch with crappy battery life.

reviews.title: I like it.
reviews.text: I had to change out the band. The buckle was a pain. I must recharge every day.

reviews.title: Upgrade
reviews.text: I initially gave my mom the first samsung watch and when it went down, she let me have it. Because I initially spoiled her with the first one I figured it was time to upgrade her. And she loves it, her favorite accessory thus far....

reviews.title: The price! Bought refurbished and love it
reviews.text: Love the price, as I only paid $136 because it was refurbished, but looks brand new and works great! Two things that I'm disappointed with 1 no YouTube app to listen to free music 2 must buy a subscription to Spotify! To listen to music on the watch. Besides those two negative things. The watch is a great buy

title: Smart Watch (Make/Receive Call), 1.09" Touch Screen Smart Watches for Women Compatible with Android iOS Phones, IP67 Waterproof Fitness Tracker with Heart Rate Blood Oxygen Sleep Monitor (Black)
features: ♚【 Smartwatch with Bluetooth phone calls】The smart watches for women built in bluetooth call functions, after connect the smart watch with your phone via Bluetooth and add contacts via APP"Lufitcode". Then you can make or receive calls on the watch directly. No worries about answering calls when your phone is in pocket with no free hand.

✯【Exquisite Design with Custom Watch Face】This bluetooth smart watch is made of zinc alloy with silicone strap, soft and elegant. The smartwatches contains 3 main dials readily available to choose from along with another 30 dials in the Lufitcode app.You can also customize the watch faces in Lufitcode APP. It can be your sefie,family, pet or scenery,etc.

♚【 Smart Notifications 】This health watches for women iphone really works "SMART" to notify Incoming calls, SMS Message, Alarm Reminder, Sedentary Reminder, Drinking Water Reminder, and SNS notifications (Wechat, Facebook, Twitter, Line, Skype, WhatsApp, Kakaotalk, Instagram, Snapchat etc). The screen will automatically wake up when you raising your hand and you can adjust the brightness of the screen.

❤【All day activity track & Health Monitoring】The bluetooth watch for iphone accurately track all-day activities like steps, calorie burned, walking mileage. It has 6 sports modes, such as football, cycling, walking, running, yoga, climbing. Which can meet the daily exercise conditions of all women. This ladies watch automatically monitor your heart rate, sleep status(deep sleep, light sleep, awake time), and provide a comprehensive sleep quality analysis.

♛【 IP67 Waterproof & Wide Compatibility & Long Standby Time 】This bluetooth watch android designed with IP67 waterproof, you can wear it during washing hands, swimming or in rainy day (NOTE: Do not use in hot water, such as showers, saunas, etc). It only takes 2 hours to fully charge the smartwatch, 15 days in standby time, and 5 days for regular use. The smart watch compatiable with Android 5.0 or iOS 9.0 or above and Bluetooth 4.0 or above.

reviews.title: Se me dañó en poco tiempo..!☹️ No quiere prender ni hace nada.. inversión perdida..!
reviews.text: Se me dañó muy rápido.. ☹️ No prende lo conecte al cargador y no agarra carga..

reviews.title: Battery keeps fading/ very limited watch faces and limited app.
reviews.text: Dealing with the company was good, they offered to send another watch as I do like the look of it. However, after having the battery fade after 1.5 days and screen going black and not having many watch faces I decided not to bother with it anymore.  Maybe the new one would be fine but I had spent too much time on a simple procedure with watch. Also, the app is limited, it did not show how much battery there was left which seems strange. I returned it.

reviews.title: Love my smart watch
reviews.text: I like the big round face. I am able o read my notifications. I have not figured out how to use the microphone for music and the timing on the stop watch.  The watch is very light and I love the being able to pick the different face cover on the front. The watch band is very comfortable.

reviews.title: Nice watch if it lasted even a day without needing charged.
reviews.text: I would have really enjoyed this watch if it wasn't for the terrible battery life. It won't even make it an entire day without needing charged up again.

reviews.title: Love it!!!!
reviews.text: I cant say enough about this watch!! I love it so much! All the features are great! My favorite is the tracking of how I sleep! The phone speaker works great to!

title: iTOUCH Explorer 3 Smartwatch (with Heart Rate Tracking, Step Counter, Notifications)
features: HEALTH AND FITNESS TRACKER: The iTouch Explorer 3 smartwatch has a built-in pedometer and a heart rate monitor that automatically tracks your steps, calories burned, cardiovascular activity and sleep. With up to 7 days of battery life!

BONUS FEATURES: Receive notifications for calls, texts, and social media. Daily weather and the 7-day forecast on your wrist. Turn your Explorer 3 into a shutter button with Camera Remote. Control your phone’s music without taking it out of your pocket with Music Remote. Set reminders to drink more water, wash hands, even get up and move around when you’ve been sitting too long. Open our mobile app to track female health, log meals, water intake, weight changes and caffeine consumption.

RUGGED DESIGN: The iTouch Explorer 3 is IP68-rated water resistant with a durable glass screen and a metal bezel to protect your device through general wear and tear. Battery working time: about 7-10 days; Standby time: 30 days.

SPORT MODES: Add another dimension to your fitness with Sports Mode. Choose from a variety of options. Activate to track steps, distance, and calories. Workouts automatically sync with the mobile app so you can look back at your entire history.

FITNESS GOALS: Stay motivated by setting goals in the iTouch Wearables app for steps, calories burned, sleep, water intake, weight and more. Check the app to see all your completed goals. LARGE WATCHFACE LIBRARY: Choose from built-in watch faces, create your own or access the LARGE watch face library in our mobile app! MOBILE PHONE COMPATIBILITY: Connect your Explorer 3 to any Android or iPhone using the iTouch Wearables app*. (*requires iOS 13 or higher and Android 9 or higher)

reviews.title: The itouch EXPLORER 3 SMART WATCH is great for monitoring your health
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:1dfba93f62e565c5c393181e1d06cded]] What I liked about the ITOUCH EXPLORER 3 SMART WATCH is the very accurate way it keeps track of your health it’s designed with your health in mind it’s easy to use and very easy to setup and stylish and sturdy comfortable wrist band and the battery life is fantastic easy to read dial and it’s a good value for your money it makes a great gift

title: Cubitt CT2S Series 3 Smart Watch 1.69" Touch Screen, Fitness Tracker, with Heart Rate, Blood Oxygen, Stress and Sleep Monitor, IP68 Waterproof, Step Counter, Pedometer Smartwatch for Women Men
features: PREMIUM DISPLAY: Large 1.69-inch TFT-LCD color HD touch screen featuring customized displays, wake up function to easily see time, date, steps, calories and distance. You can personalize the dial with many of our style options, and can even upload a personal picture to be on your smart watch background

SMART FUNCTIONS: Receive Call, Text, Whatsapp and Social Media notifications. Incoming calls can be alerted via vibration reminders, with the option to hang up. Display up to 128 characters on your tracker screen. Sedentary alerts can be turned On, to be alerted with vibration reminders after a specific time of no movement. Alarm clock + timer, and calendar alerts are also shown on the screen as notifications. Option to sync data with Strava

ALL DAY FITNESS TRACKING: Track your daily activities with a built-in accelerometer sensor that allows you to track distance traveled, record steps, get calories burned, and review active minutes, including pace. Your workout progress can be simply viewed directly from our app, by choosing between 14 different sports modes including Outdoor / Outdoor Running and Walking, Outdoor cycling, Spinning bike, Cricket, Hiking, Swimming, Yoga,Rowing machine, Elliptical trainer, Fitness, and others

HEART RATE, BLOOD OXYGEN, SLEEP AND STRESS MONITOR: Automatically monitors your daily heart rate, blood oxygen and stress. You can read directly on the watch all day, which helps you understand your health and make reasonable adjustments on your life style. Also monitors your sleep which gives you a comprenhensive analysis of your sleep. Our app allows you to review graphs that analyze how deep or light is your sleep and your wake-up times.

APP PAIRING AND BATTERY: pairing is simple, by using Bluetooth 4.2, automatically sync your device to a phone using iOS 8. 0/Android OS 4. 4 or above. Built with a 300mAh battery that takes less than 2 hours to charge and can be used for up to 10 days with a standby time of 30-45 days. You can adjust the screen brightness according to your needs

reviews.title: Great watch for a great price
reviews.text: I was skeptical about the watch as I had purchased other watches only to have them fail miserably. This watch turned out great. The most important thing to do is read the manual. Especially about how to wear the watch, which is a little higher than a normal watch. This will make the accuracy much better. The step counter is controlled by arm movement not actual steps, so if you walk stiff armed , it will be inaccurate. Move your arms when walking , the watch will be much more accurate.Make sure you go into the app on your phone and activate the exercises your interested in. This will help the watch to track it better. Also activate the media part of the app for sms,email etc. You can also monitor who is calling you, so you can choose to answer you phone or not. I am extremely pleased with my purchase and will be watching for other products from this company.

reviews.title: Loved it..: til it burned me!
reviews.text: I loved it until I woke up with a burn!!

reviews.title: As advertised
reviews.text: Great watch! Exactly what I wanted (a watch to count steps and that is easy to read). The set up was fairly easy - I received the watch in the early evening and had it set up within half an hour ( I am in my seventies). This is my 3rd watch - first was very expensive and too invasive - second watch cost twice as much as this one and quit charging in the second week - third times a charm.

reviews.title: Hard to set up.
reviews.text: Very difficult to program. I will be sending it back.

reviews.title: There were very little instructions on how to use/set up the watch.  Had to go online to search.
reviews.text: Face of watch is good, and seems like good quality.  Plus I like that it is a touch screen/can swipe.

title: Military Smart Watch for Men (Answer/Dial Calls), 2023 Newest Bluetooth Tactical SmartWatch for Android and iPhone, 5ATM Waterproof Outdoor Fitness Tracker with Heart Rate/SpO2/Sleep/AI Voice, Black
features: FOLLOW YOU OUTDOOR EXPLORE - The tactical outdoor smart watch with a Micro-blasted metal frame and titanium body, and the smartwatch has passed 15 military standard tests, with cold/heat temperature ictus function, and enhanced 5ATM water resistance supports 20 meters underwater. An extra camouflage band is presented exclusively for the explorer.

HAND UP TO COMMUNICATE - The military smart watch has a built-in Hi-Fi speaker and ribbon microphone. It supports Bluetooth to make, and receive calls, play music, and voice assistant, freeing your hands from your phone. Turn on the "Phone" mode of the watch and connect to the Bluetooth named "Audio_HM09" (call) in the phone settings. It makes communication freer.

YOUR HEALTH IS ALWAYS IN YOUR EYES - Men's smart watch is equipped with the 2022 latest high-precision optical sensors. It can efficiently monitor heart rate, blood oxygen. A rugged smart watch makes also monitors sleep and provides sleep trends for the last seven days, analyzes your health status in real-time, and helps you adjust to a healthy lifestyle.

PERSONAL EXERCISE ASSISTANT - The smart watches for iPhone have 8 indoor and outdoor sports modes, tailored for you who love sports. Data can be monitored in real-time during exercise. Just lift your wrist to view various data, such as steps, distance, calories, etc., It makes helps you achieve your fitness goals. It is the best choice for summer/travel/festival.

COMPREHENSIVE TECHNICAL SUPPORT - Compatible with Android 5.0/iOS 10.0 or higher and Bluetooth 5.0 or higher. Ultra-low power consumption, 1.5 hours of full charge support used for 45 days of standby, 20 days of typical use, or ten days of heavy use. Android smart watch also provides various functions such as weather forecast, alarm clock, games, timer, and more. It is the best gift for a man/him/dad/friend.

24/7 AFTER-SALES SUPPORT - When you connect the watch for the first time, please follow the mobile phone prompts to turn on all the permissions required for the smart watch. If you encounter any problems during the purchase process, please feel free to contact us through Amazon. Our team of engineers is at your service in real-time!

FRIENDLY REMINDER - When you get the smart watch, please charge it as soon as possible to activate the smartwatch, and it can be used normally when the watch is fully charged.(note: for sports use only)

reviews.title: A little issue with it
reviews.text:
(2) problems with it
1.- evertime is underwater or in the shower unlock on its own and features move around
2.- as I use Google maps to look for an address and start the trip the watch vibrate like crazy none stop draining the battery since sometimes I drive an hour away , only solution I found so far is to disconnect it from my phone , beside that is a good watch ,

reviews.title: Nice looking watch
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:b4de8e874f377ccd97bd630c275f3fb7]] Nice looking watch I thought. Has a cooler tactical style look than an Apple Watch in my onion.

Overall it seems nice. Good functionality that would help on a daily basis I thought.

Band is nice with the camo style look to it.

reviews.title: Functions as advertised
reviews.text: Some of the functions I don't have the need to use, but those that I do use perform perfectly.  The extra watch band was a plus.  Well worth the price.

reviews.title: Good for the price.
reviews.text: Got this cause I don’t want to spend the money for a Apple Watch. And I’m really hard on watches and phones. All said and done it works fine. Battery life isn’t as described. About 2 days. Fits nice. Does the job.

reviews.title: Didn't last long
reviews.text: Stopped working about 45 days after purchasing
